bullets.bullet_point: Add a hard step limit to prevent infinite loops
Exit early when agent signals completion
Fail gracefully if it can’t finish within the budget

result.all_text_in_order: In code MAX_STEPS = 12 - Add a hard step limitto prevent infinite loops for step in range (MAX_STEPS): ... - Exit early when agent signals completion if "FINAL:" in msg.text: return msg.text return "FAILED: hit step limit" - Fail gracefully if it can’t finish within the budget I'liTAI STUDIO AI Agents and Agentic Web MAS.664/MAS.665/EC.731/IDS.865 הוווו
